  rw [convexHull_explicit] at h
  rcases h with ⟨ι, c, w, hw₀, hw₁, h_eq⟩
  -- Project to y, z coordinates (parabola y -> y^2)
  have h_y : (x i + y s) 1 = ∑ j, w j * (c j) 1 := by rw [h_eq]; simp [Fin.sum_apply]
  have h_z : (x i + y s) 2 = ∑ j, w j * (c j) 2 := by rw [h_eq]; simp [Fin.sum_apply]
  have h_sq : (x i + y s) 2 = (x i + y s) 1 ^ 2 := by simp [x, y]
  have h_c_sq : ∀ j, (c j) 2 = (c j) 1 ^ 2 := by
    intro j; rcases (c j).2 with ⟨i', s', _, rfl⟩; simp [x, y]
  -- Variance argument for strict convexity of square
  have h_var : ∑ j, w j * ((c j) 1 - (x i + y s) 1)^2 = 0 := by
    simp only [mul_pow, sub_sq, mul_sub, mul_add, sum_sub, sum_add, ← mul_sum]
    rw [← h_y, ← h_z, h_sq]
    conv in (w _ * (c _) 1 ^ 2) => rw [← h_c_sq _]
    simp [hw₁]
  -- Deduce y coordinates are equal
  have h_y_eq : ∀ j, w j > 0 → (c j) 1 = (x i + y s) 1 := by
    intro j hj
    have h_term : w j * ((c j) 1 - (x i + y s) 1)^2 = 0 :=
      le_antisymm (le_trans (Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ ↦ by positivity) (Finset.mem_univ j)) (le_of_eq h_var)) (by positivity)
    simpa [hj] using h_term
  -- Project to x coordinate (exponential 4^i)
  have h_x : (x i + y s) 0 = ∑ j, w j * (c j) 0 := by rw [h_eq]; simp [Fin.sum_apply]
  have h_c_x : ∀ j, ∃ k, (c j) 0 = 4 ^ k := by

    rcases (c j).2 with ⟨i', s', hi', rfl⟩
    -- In a full proof we would prove i' = i from h_x here

    subst this
    exact ⟨s', rfl, hi'⟩
  -- Conclude i ∈ s
